title: Mass restore archived items
excerpt: There is no way to restore a large number of items except to scroll and select the checkbox of each item one at a time. It woudl be great to have a select all check box feature (like you have in groups) and mass restore …

posts.author: tself (Timothy Self)
posts.cookedHtml: There is no way to restore a large number of items except to scroll and select the checkbox of each item one at a time. It woudl be great to have a select all check box feature (like you have in groups) and mass restore items
